name: git
description: Git decorations: changed files in the explorer and dirty-diff bars in the editor gutter.

git.enabled.description: Master switch for the built-in Git integration.

git.decorations.enabled.description: Colour and badge changed files in the explorer tree.

git.gutter.enabled.description: Show dirty-diff change bars in the editor gutter.

git.path.description: Path to a git binary to prefer (its directory is prepended to PATH). Empty uses git from PATH.

git.refreshDebounce.description: Debounce, in milliseconds, before recomputing git status and diff after a change.
